item.description: Yes, Heated Rivalry is on the list.

item.title: The Biggest Book News of the Week
item.description: The death (?) of BookTok, the return of Barbara Kingsolver, the best nonfiction of the 21st century, and more.

item.title: Inside the Wuthering Heights Marketing Machine
item.description: An army of influencers, a bundle of brand partnerships, and a big box office take. Plus: a new Barbara Kingsolver novel, and more.
